title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sonata Software

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sonata Software
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Sonata Software in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sonata Software:
Sonata Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software!
